message:
feat: wire session identity, history continuity, and resume

- SessionController accepts explicit sessionId (for resume)
- createAgent accepts and forwards sessionId
- defaultFactory forwards sessionId to createAgent
- Agent accepts initialHistory for conversation continuity
- SessionController accumulates history from depth-0 events
- SessionController passes accumulated history to factory
- CLI resume block passes sessionId and history to controller

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
